title: PirateCraft
description: A Fabric Modpack Aiming To Make Minecraft More Piratey!
body: A Fabric Modpack Aiming To Make Minecraft More Piratey! Includes: Four Bosses For You To Take On And Defeat, Tons Of Custom Weapons And Armour, Pirate Ship Structures For You To Plunder, Craftable Ships For You To Sail The Seas With, Water Level Raised To Y=127, An Invite System To Play Online With Your Friends And Voice Chat To Speak To Them In Game!
